title: La Fortaleza and San Juan National Historic Site in Puerto Rico
description: A Spanish stronghold guarding the Caribbean, San Juan’s historic forts anchor the story of Conquistadora by Esmeralda Santiago, where ambition, upheaval, and identity collide.

title: Historic Centre of Lima
description: Called the City of Kings, Lima’s historic centre blends colonial grandeur with living culture. Baroque churches and carved balconies line streets.

title: City of Cusco
description: Cusco sits high in the Andes. Once the capital of the Inca Empire, Cusco was laid out in the shape of a sacred puma, blending cosmology, imperial authority, and ritual space.

title: Paris, Banks of the Seine
description: From Notre-Dame to the Louvre, its bridges and quays frame centuries of art, revolution, and romance. The very spirit is captured in Victor Hugo’s The Hunchback of Notre-Dame.
